languages.text: {n}Он снимает с пояса необычного вида клинок с мягко светящимся лезвием.{/n} "Ты помог{mf||ла} мне, и тем доказа{mf|л|ла} свою верность. Этот меч принадлежал одному из моих братьев, павших в бою, и его необходимо вернуть в {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Караул.{/g} Теперь это — твой долг, поскольку мне вряд ли суждено покинуть это место".

traits.locale_text: "Благодарю тебя, слуга Бога-Императора. Твоя помощь невероятно своевременна, и в том я вижу волю Его, направившую тебя". {n}Он вытаскивает из ножен необычного вида клинок с мягко светящимся лезвием.{/n} "Прими эту реликвию и стань ее хранителем. Если в своих странствиях встретишь кого-то из {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Караула{/g}, вручи ему клинок и сообщи, что брат Виктус исполнил свой долг в жизни и в смерти".
traits.speaker: Blood_Raven

languages.text: {n}He removes an unusual-looking blade with a softly glowing edge from his belt.{/n} "You helped me, and thus proved your loyalty. This sword belonged to one of my brothers who fell in battle. It must be returned to the {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g}. Now this duty is yours, for I have little hope of leaving this place."
languages.original_text: {n}Он снимает с пояса необычного вида клинок с мягко светящимся лезвием.{/n} "Ты помог{mf||ла} мне, и тем доказа{mf|л|ла} свою верность. Этот меч принадлежал одному из моих братьев, павших в бою, и его необходимо вернуть в {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Караул.{/g} Теперь это — твой долг, поскольку мне вряд ли суждено покинуть это место".

This sword belonged to one of my brothers who fell in battle. It must be returned to the {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g}. Now this duty is yours, for I have little hope of leaving this place."

{n}He removes an unusual-looking blade with a softly glowing edge from his belt.{/n} "You helped me, and thus proved your loyalty. This sword belonged to one of my brothers who fell in battle. It must be returned to the {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g}. Now this duty is yours, for I have little hope of leaving this place."

"Thank you, servant of the God-Emperor. Your aid is incredibly timely, and in that I see His will guiding you." {n}He unsheathes an unusual-looking blade with a softly glowing edge.{/n} "Accept this relic and become its keeper. If on your wanderings you meet someone from the Watch, give him this blade and tell him that Brother Victus fulfilled his duty in life and in death."

{n}He removes an unusual-looking blade with a softly glowing edge from his belt.{/n} "You helped me, and thus proved your loyalty. This sword belonged to one of my brothers who fell in battle. It must be returned to the {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g}. Now this duty is yours, for I have little hope of leaving this place."

{n}He removes an unusual-looking blade with a softly glowing edge from his belt.{/n} "You helped me, and thus proved your loyalty. This sword belonged to one of my brothers who fell in battle. It must be returned to the {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g}. Now this duty is yours, for I have little hope of leaving this place."

languages.text: 「神皇帝のしもべ、ありがとう。君の助けはまさに今に必要とされた。神皇帝の意志が君を導いているのだと感じる。」{n}彼は、柔らかな光を放つ不思議な形の刀を抜き、言った。{/n}「この遺物を受け取り、その守護者となれ。旅の途中でウォッチの者と出会ったならば、この刀を渡し、ヴィクトゥス兄弟が生と死の両方で己の義務を果たしたと伝えよ。」
languages.original_text: "Thank you, servant of the God-Emperor. Your aid is incredibly timely, and in that I see His will guiding you." {n}He unsheathes an unusual-looking blade with a softly glowing edge.{/n} "Accept this relic and become its keeper. If on your wanderings you meet someone from the Watch, give him this blade and tell him that Brother Victus fulfilled his duty in life and in death."

traits.locale_text: 「神皇帝のしもべ、ありがとう。君の助けはまさに今に必要とされた。神皇帝の意志が君を導いているのだと感じる。」{n}彼は、柔らかな光を放つ不思議な形の刀を抜き、言った。「この遺物を受け取り、その守護者となれ。旅の途中でウォッチの者と出会ったならば、この刀を渡し、ヴィクトゥス兄弟が生と死の両方で己の義務を果たしたと伝えよ。」

languages.text: {n}Se quita del cinturón una espada de aspecto singular, que emite un leve brillo desde la hoja.{/n} «Me has ayudado, demostrando tu lealtad. Esta espada fue de uno de mis hermanos, caído en combate. Debe volver a manos de los {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Vigías de la Muerte{/g}. Te corresponde el deber, ya que no tengo muchas esperanzas de salir de aquí».
languages.original_text: {n}He removes an unusual-looking blade with a softly glowing edge from his belt.{/n} "You helped me, and thus proved your loyalty. This sword belonged to one of my brothers who fell in battle. It must be returned to the {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g}. Now this duty is yours, for I have little hope of leaving this place."

traits.locale_text: {n}Se quita del cinturón una espada de aspecto singular, que emite un leve brillo desde la hoja.{/n} «Me has ayudado, demostrando tu lealtad. Esta espada fue de uno de mis hermanos, caído en combate. Debe volver a manos de los {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Vigías de la Muerte{/g}. Te corresponde el deber, ya que no tengo muchas esperanzas de salir de aquí».

languages.text: {n}Er nimmt eine ungewöhnliche Klinge mit einer sanft schimmernden Schneide von seinem Gürtel.{/n} "Ihr habt mir geholfen und damit Eure Loyalität bewiesen. Dieses Schwert gehörte einem meiner Brüder, der in der Schlacht fiel. Es muss zur {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g} zurückgebracht werden. Das ist nun Eure Pflicht, denn ich habe nur wenig Hoffnung, diesen Ort zu verlassen."
languages.original_text: {n}He removes an unusual-looking blade with a softly glowing edge from his belt.{/n} "You helped me, and thus proved your loyalty. This sword belonged to one of my brothers who fell in battle. It must be returned to the {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g}. Now this duty is yours, for I have little hope of leaving this place."

traits.locale_text: {n}Er nimmt eine ungewöhnliche Klinge mit einer sanft schimmernden Schneide von seinem Gürtel.{/n} "Ihr habt mir geholfen und damit Eure Loyalität bewiesen. Dieses Schwert gehörte einem meiner Brüder, der in der Schlacht fiel. Es muss zur {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g} zurückgebracht werden. Das ist nun Eure Pflicht, denn ich habe nur wenig Hoffnung, diesen Ort zu verlassen."

languages.text: {n}Il dégaine une lame intrigante dont le tranchant luit étrangement.{/n} « Vous avez prouvé votre loyauté en m'apportant votre aide. Cette épée appartenait à l'un de mes frères tombés au combat. Il doit revenir à la {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g}. Je vous confie cette mission, car j'ai peu d'espoir de survivre à cet endroit. »
languages.original_text: {n}He removes an unusual-looking blade with a softly glowing edge from his belt.{/n} "You helped me, and thus proved your loyalty. This sword belonged to one of my brothers who fell in battle. It must be returned to the {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g}. Now this duty is yours, for I have little hope of leaving this place."

traits.locale_text: {n}Il dégaine une lame intrigante dont le tranchant luit étrangement.{/n} « Vous avez prouvé votre loyauté en m'apportant votre aide. Cette épée appartenait à l'un de mes frères tombés au combat. Il doit revenir à la {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g}. Je vous confie cette mission, car j'ai peu d'espoir de survivre à cet endroit. »

languages.text: {n}他从腰间拔出一柄形制奇特、刃锋泛着微光的剑。{/n}“你救了我，由此证明了你的一片忠心。这把剑原属于我一位战死的兄弟。它必须被送还给{g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}死亡守望{/g}。如今，这份职责便交给你了，因为我几乎不可能离开这里了。”
languages.original_text: {n}He removes an unusual-looking blade with a softly glowing edge from his belt.{/n} "You helped me, and thus proved your loyalty. This sword belonged to one of my brothers who fell in battle. It must be returned to the {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g}. Now this duty is yours, for I have little hope of leaving this place."

traits.locale_text: {n}他从腰间拔出一柄形制奇特、刃锋泛着微光的剑。{/n}“你救了我，由此证明了你的一片忠心。这把剑原属于我一位战死的兄弟。它必须被送还给{g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}死亡守望{/g}。如今，这份职责便交给你了，因为我几乎不可能离开这里了。”

languages.text: {n}Kemerinden hafifçe parlayan, bir ucu olan alışılmadık görünümlü bir bıçak çıkarıyor.{/n} "Bana yardım ettin, sadakatini kanıtladın. Bu kılıç, savaşta yiten kardeşlerimden birine aitti. {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Ölümnöbeti'ne{/g} geri verilmeli. Artık bu vazife senin zira buradan çıkma umudum çok az."
languages.original_text: {n}He removes an unusual-looking blade with a softly glowing edge from his belt.{/n} "You helped me, and thus proved your loyalty. This sword belonged to one of my brothers who fell in battle. It must be returned to the {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g}. Now this duty is yours, for I have little hope of leaving this place."

Bu kılıç, savaşta yiten kardeşlerimden birine aitti. {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Ölümnöbeti'ne{/g} geri verilmeli. Artık bu vazife senin zira buradan çıkma umudum çok az."
